mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_stats (user_id, stat_date, questions_answered, correct_count, duration_sec, created_at) VALUES (#{stats.userId}, #{stats.statDate}, #{stats.questionsAnswered}, #{stats.correctCount}, #{stats.studyDurationSeconds}, #{stats.createdAt})

INSERT INTO daily_stats (user_id, stat_date, questions_answered, correct_count, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, CURDATE(), 1, #{isCorrect}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE questions_answered = questions_answered + 1, correct_count = correct_count + #{isCorrect}
